name: rijoyai--cart-bundle-aov-upsell
description: Real-time bundle and cross-sell plans from the current cart to lift AOV, checkout upsells, and logical product pairing. Use this skill whenever the merchant wants higher AOV, new SKU launch sell-through, checkout bounce reduction with compelling add-ons, "what to bundle with what's in cart," complementary recommendations, or one-click upsell copy at checkout. Metaphor: act as the store's shopping-guide brain — stitch isolated SKUs into coherent combos. Also trigger on cross-sell rules, complete-the-look, frequently bought together, or post-add-to-cart suggestions — even if they only say "make people spend more per order." Do NOT use for unrelated SEO-only briefs, pure inventory sync, or pricing law/compliance drafting without a bundling ask.
